titleStmt.title: SII 10.495: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 495. (A.R. No. 387 of 1926.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE TEMPLE OF GAṆṬALA RĀMALINGASVĀMI, TAṄGEḌA, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1230. (Kīlaka)

summary.p: States that, while Pratāpa-Rudradēva was ruling the earth and Dēvari-Nāyaka was his governor at Taṅgeḍa, the eighteen assemblies (samaya) and the merchants (?) of Taṅgeḍa, assigned to the temple of Rāmanātha, a duty on all sales in the town at the rate of a vīsam per māḍa of the sale price.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakavarṣaṁbulu 1230 Agunēṁṭi kī
lakasaṁvatsara caitra śuddha 10 sō . svasti śrī
manmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara kākatiyyapra
tāparudradēvamahārājulu
prithivirājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgā
nu mācayanāyuniṁgāri ko
ḍuku dēvarināyuniṁgāri sannidhini ta
ṁgeḍastalamu padunenimidisamayāla
vārūnu Ubhayanānādēśi pekkaṁḍrū
nu taṁgeḍagaṁṭala rāmanāthadēvaraku
raṁgabhōgānaku Ammubaḍi viluvalaku
māḍaku māḍabaḍi vīsāmu dēvarinā
yuniṁgārikiṁ buṇyamugānu Ācaṁ
drārkastāyigānu Istimi maṁgaḷama
hā śrīśrīśrī . svadattaṁ dvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.495 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
